name: Ticket Expiry (Missed Turn)
description: Tests that a READY ticket automatically expires if the holding agent fails to claim it within the timeout latency, promoting the next blocked agent natively instead.

steps.comment: 1. Agent A successfully acquires the primary lease
2. Agent B enters the async queue, receiving a ticket
3. Agent C enters the queue natively as a normal blocking request
4. Agent A yields, resolving the active lease
5. B's ticket is promoted to READY by the Watchdog because A yielded
6-7. Simulate Agent B crashing. Wait up to 60s for the broker to organically expire B's ticket and promote Agent C.
